title: SURVIVOR ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: ILLINOIS VALLEY SAFE HOUSE ALLIANCE SURVIVOR ADVOCACY AND SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of advocacy and support to survivors of domestic violence, elder abuse, dating violence, trafficking, or sexual assault. Services include crisis intervention, court and medical accompaniment, peer advocacy, support groups, assistance with locating financial help, assistance with restraining and stalking orders, community education, referrals to meet emergency needs, and emergency shelter. 103 S Kerby Avenue Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic violence, elder abuse, dating violence, trafficking, or sexual assault Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, closed federal holidays Email (541) 592-2515 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 592-2515 Main phone (541) 592-5332 Administration (541) 415-9367 Hotline After-hours (541) 415-9367 Hotline After Hours Main phone (541) 592-2515 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, American Sign Language AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across from the City of Cave Junction building, next to the Cave Junction Post Office. Services: Crime Victim Accompaniment Services Crime Victim/Witness Counseling Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Shelters Domestic Violence Support Groups Protective/Restraining Orders Sexual Assault Counseling Sexual Assault Hotlines Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Spouse/Intimate Partner Abuse Counseling Transportation for Endangered People Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HELPING CHILDREN EXPOSED TO BATTERERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ILLINOIS VALLEY SAFE HOUSE ALLIANCE
